title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 231.270 - May abolish contract system of working roads — how
text:
231.270.  May abolish contract system of working roads — how. — Whenever the inhabitants of any township under township organization having previously adopted the contract system of working roads, as provided for in section 231.240, desire to change such system, they may abolish said system in the same manner as provided in section 231.240 for the establishment of said system.
(RSMo 1939 § 8827) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8167
